component.name: Slashmad FFmpeg GUI
component.summary: GTK4 FFmpeg capture, editing, and encoding workflow for slashmad

description.p: Slashmad FFmpeg GUI is a GTK4 desktop frontend for FFmpeg focused on Linux analog capture, VHS digitizing, post-capture cleanup, and controlled exports.

ul.li: Capture VHS and other analog sources from USB, PCI, and PCIe hardware.
Use Magix USB capture devices on Linux for USB-to-VHS and VHS-to-digital workflows.
Monitor live video and audio, then trim and inspect files inside the app.
Export archive, delivery, or proxy outputs with explicit FFmpeg settings.
Review hardware acceleration support and exact generated FFmpeg commands.

screenshot.caption: Capture workflow for VHS and analog sources with live preview and archive-oriented defaults.
Timelapse workflow with compact dark controls and inline log output.
Edit workflow with playback, frame-accurate trim controls, and export corrections.
Hardware acceleration overview for FFmpeg encoders and GPU capabilities.
